description: Raghav Gulati, CEO of CoinList, discusses the importance of bringing vetted token launches to the U.S. market, emphasizing the need for on-chain products and the role of Solana and CoinList in this ecosystem. He invites founders facing regulatory challenges to collaborate with them for better opportunities.
topic_summary: Raghav Gulati outlines CoinList's mission to facilitate token launches in the U.S. and the significance of Solana in enabling decentralized financial markets. He highlights the need for credible infrastructure and invites founders to join their efforts in building on-chain revenue-generating companies [t=2:72-145:90].
